Package com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api

Interface UserService

All Superinterfaces:
Remote
public interface UserService extends Remote
The remote interface for the user-management API.

  • Field Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    RMI_USERSERVICE_APPLICATION_NAME
    Name of the user service application in the registry.

  • Field Details

    • RMI_USERSERVICE_APPLICATION_NAME

      static final String RMI_USERSERVICE_APPLICATION_NAME
      Name of the user service application in the registry.

      • Constant Field Values

  • Method Details

    • create

      @Privileged <Type extends UserManagementItem> Type create(int token, Type user, Class<Type> type) throws RemoteException, com.saperion.rmi.serverexception.NativeException
      Creates a new user.
      Parameters:
      token - token to identify the user who wants to create another user
      user - the new user
      Throws:
      RemoteException - remote exception
      com.saperion.rmi.serverexception.NativeException

    • find

      <Type extends UserManagementItem> Set<Type> find(int token, SearchOptions<Type> options) throws RemoteException, com.saperion.exception.SaSystemException
      Finds items by searching for the specified values in the specified fields. All fields must match the specified values (AND).
      Parameters:
      token - token to identify the user who wants to search for other users
      options -
      Returns:
      set of users matching the condition
      Throws:
      RemoteException - remote exception
      com.saperion.exception.SaSystemException

    • getDescriptor

      <Type extends UserManagementItem> Descriptor<Type> getDescriptor(int token, Class<Type> type) throws RemoteException
      Gets the descriptor of an item-type. A descriptor is a set of meta-data describing all the attributes of a type with name, data-type and if this attribute comes from an extension-table.
      Type Parameters:
      Type - any class that extends UserManagementItem
      Parameters:
      token - token for identification
      type - the type of the item. Can be any class that extends UserManagementItem
      Returns:
      the descriptor of all the attributes of the item-type
      Throws:
      RemoteException - remote exception

    • delete

      @Privileged <Type extends UserManagementItem> void delete(int token, int id, Class<Type> type) throws RemoteException, com.saperion.rmi.serverexception.NativeException
      Deletes an item.
      Type Parameters:
      Type - any class that extends UserManagementItem
      Parameters:
      token - token for identification
      id - the id of the item
      type - the type of the item. Can be any class that extends UserManagementItem
      Throws:
      RemoteException - remote exception
      com.saperion.rmi.serverexception.NativeException

    • isDeleted

      @Privileged <Type extends UserManagementItem> boolean isDeleted(int token, Type item, Class<Type> type) throws RemoteException, com.saperion.rmi.serverexception.NativeException
      Checks if an item is deleted.
      Type Parameters:
      Type - any class that extends UserManagementItem
      Parameters:
      token - token for identification
      item - the item which should be checked for deletion. Must contain ID or NAME
      type - the type of the item. Can be any class that extends UserManagementItem
      Throws:
      RemoteException - remote exception
      com.saperion.rmi.serverexception.NativeException

    • update

      <Type extends UserManagementItem> Type update(int token, Type item, Class<Type> type) throws RemoteException, com.saperion.exception.SaSystemException
      Updates the respective item in the Backend. The item to update in the Backend is identified using the provided item's id
      Type Parameters:
      Type - any class that extends UserManagementItem
      Parameters:
      token - token for identification
      item - the item which should be updated. Must contain all attributes
      type - the type of the item. Can be any class that extends UserManagementItem
      Returns:
      the updated item
      Throws:
      RemoteException - remote exception
      com.saperion.exception.SaSystemException

    • clone

      <Type extends UserManagementItem> Type clone(int token, int id, Type item, Class<Type> type) throws RemoteException, com.saperion.exception.SaSystemException
      The original user will be retrieved by id. The values (DisplayName, MailAdress and Description) of the item will be overwritten, by the values of the original user. All values stored in the schema extension will be loaded of the original user. If the item contains extended values, they will overwrite the original ones. If the item contains the tenant id, the user will be cloned into the specific tenant. If no tenant was specified or is the same, the new user will be added to the same groups of the original user.
      Parameters:
      token - session token
      id - id of the original user
      item - cloned item
      type - Type of the item which should be created
      Returns:
      Throws:
      RemoteException
      com.saperion.exception.SaSystemException

    • changePassword

      void changePassword(int token, int id, String oldPassword, String newPassword) throws RemoteException, com.saperion.rmi.serverexception.NativeException
      Parameters:
      token - A valid Token for your Session
      oldPassword - old password
      newPassword - new password
      Throws:
      RemoteException - Exception if the Password couldn't be changed
      com.saperion.rmi.serverexception.NativeException

    • setPassword

      @Privileged void setPassword(int token, int userId, String newPassword) throws RemoteException, com.saperion.rmi.serverexception.NativeException
      Sets a new password to a user. This action requires administrative rights.
      Parameters:
      token - A valid Token for your Session.
      userId - the id of the user to change the password for - may not be null or empty. The user must exist in the system.
      newPassword - new password - may not be null or empty.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - Exception if the Password couldn't be changed
      com.saperion.rmi.serverexception.NativeException

    • encrypt

      String encrypt(int token, String toEncrypt) throws RemoteException
      Encrypt a String in the context of the server and user. Only the user which has encrypted the string is able to decrypt it again.
      Parameters:
      token - A valid Token for your Session
      toEncrypt - the string which should be encrypted
      Returns:
      the encrypted string
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the string couldn't be encrypted

    • decrypt

      String decrypt(int token, String toDecrypt) throws RemoteException
      Decrypt a String in the context of the server and user. Only the user which has encrypted the string is able to decrypt it again.
      Parameters:
      token - A valid Token for your Session
      toDecrypt - the encrypted string which should be decrypted
      Returns:
      the decrypted string
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the string couldn't be decrypted

    • generate

      com.saperion.jcs.modules.authentication.api.AccessToken<String> generate(int token, long expires, TimeUnit unit, Collection<String> additionalOptions) throws RemoteException
      Generates an AccessToken which can be used with the help of the UsernameAccessTokenKey to login into SAPERION.
      Parameters:
      token - A valid Token for your Session
      expires - count of seconds if unit == TimeUnit.SECONDS
      unit - TimeUnit
      additionalOptions - Values which will be encoded into the token, which must be passed with the login
      Returns:
      Throws:
      RemoteException
